text:
geom_virstor.ki is not built on FreeBSD 7.0-RC1.

Fix: 

MFC src/sys/modules/geom/Makefile 1.20 to RELENG_7 and RELENG_7_0.
How-To-Repeat: See
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/src/sys/modules/geom/Makefile.

gvirstor is added at rev. 1.20.
RELENG_7 is created at rev. 1.19.
